description: Write side effects in MCallGetProperty opcode not accounted for. CVE-2020-26950, sec-critical. In js/src/jit/MIR.h, MCallGetProperty was marked idempotent_=true when emitted by IonBuilder::createThisScripted to read the constructor's .prototype slot, so Ion treated the call as effect-free. But the .prototype getter could trigger js::fun_resolve, which lazily writes the new property and may relocate the function's slot storage. The Ion cache cached a pre-relocation slot pointer; on next entry it dereferenced the freed/moved memory → type confusion sufficient for Pwn2Own-style RCE. Fix: hg 8cdc2037b4b0 'Bug 1675905 - Simplify IonBuilder::createThisScripted' (Ted Campbell, Phabricator D96309) — emits a getThis IC rather than the bespoke idempotent MCallGetProperty so the slot reload is correctly observed. Reproduces with --fuzzing-safe --no-warp --no-threads on debug+ASAN.
